author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Mixtape developer claims the game won’t be delisted due to its licensed music Annapurna dismisses concerns, claims licenses were agreed in perpetuity

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: After a fan poll, Microsoft’s new games boss is rebranding Xbox, to ‘XBOX’ Asha Sharma previously switched from 'Microsoft Gaming' in one of many changes
